events.content: On April 8, 2026, prisoner of conscience Félix Navarro, age 72, was beaten and placed in isolation after his scheduled family visit, according to his wife, Sonia Álvarez. Immediately after leaving the visiting area, prison officer Norlen Pedroso Sotolongo verbally abused him and ordered an intrusive search of all his belongings.
